feat.name: Lesson of Mutual Gambits
feat.requirement: Your last action was a success to Feint.
feat.text: You create an opening for your student, setting them up for their own attack. The creature you Feinted is off-guard to the first Strike or spell attack roll your student makes against it before the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.
